changes.summary: Normalized RSS alternate URL to /feed.xml and registered favicon metadata.
Added a minimal SVG favicon to remove the 404 gap.
Created a root project README aligned with the current product concept and runtime architecture.
Recorded the open performance follow-up around LCP and Lighthouse score.
Closed the legacy favicon.ico path with a redirect to favicon.svg so production smoke checks pass.

Lighthouse Performance remains at 88 and LCP remains at 3.9s.
recommendations: Run live writer evaluation across world, markets, tech, and sports topics.
Perform a focused performance pass to reduce LCP and raise Lighthouse Performance above 90.
